jsonLd.title: Hopscotch is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Hopscotch:
Hopscotch is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
